ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview or synopsis of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in dollars */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie in dollars */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie poster image */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Path to the backdrop image */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* JSON array of production companies involved */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* JSON array of countries where the movie was produced */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* JSON array of languages spoken in the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie (e.g., 'Released', 'In Production') */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDb ID for the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the keyword is associated with */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword describing a theme or element of the movie */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the keyword to the movie */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the keyword (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the actor in the cast list */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character played by the actor */,
  "actor_popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the actor */,
  "character_type" TEXT /* Type of character (e.g., protagonist, antagonist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the crew member is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the crew member belongs to */,
  "crew_member_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_age" INTEGER /* Age of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_experience" TEXT /* JSON array of previous projects the crew member has worked on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the genre is associated with */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, marketer, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
